voile.name: Voile Straps
voile.description: Simply the best (in our subjective opinion) straps for securing just about anything on a bike tour or bikepacking trip. A perfect match for our cages.
voile.characteristic.nine-black: Secures items ~1.3 - 6.4 cm wide, suitable for a slim flashlight, multitool in a case, or a pump.
voile.characteristic.twelve-black: Secures items ~1.9 - 8.9 cm wide, suitable for a 0.5 L bottle (≈6.5 cm), a standard 0.5-0.7 L cycling bottle, or an inner tube.
voile.characteristic.twenty-black-w-logo: Secures items ~2.5 - 10.2 cm wide, suitable for a Nalgene or Klean Kanteen bottle, a 1.5 L bottle (≈8.5 cm), or a 1 L thermos.
voile.characteristic.twenty-five-black-w: Secures items ~5.1 - 19.1 cm wide, suitable for a dry bag, sleeping bag, tent, sleeping pad, or a 2 L bottle.
